CustomField.description:
The street address of the applicant at the time the application is submitted.
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The street address of the applicant at the time the application is submitted.
Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync this address with the Contact record.
CustomField.label: Applicant Street
